conditions.displayName: No rebalance health heartbeat for 5 minutes

conditionAbsent.filter: resource.type = "k8s_container" AND metric.type = "logging.googleapis.com/user/poly_bot_rebalance_health_heartbeat" AND resource.labels.cluster_name = "arb-bot" AND resource.labels.namespace_name = "arb-bot" AND resource.labels.container_name = "arb-bot"

documentation.content: The production `poly_bot` runtime has not emitted a rebalance health heartbeat for five minutes. The process, GKE pod, logging path, or event loop may be unavailable. Check the `arb-bot` Deployment and pod logs, then verify that the durable rebalance journal has one owner before restarting or recovering anything.
